( hyperlink "http://www.dit.ulpgc.es/" dit) circuit theory. analogical electronic circuits. digital electronic circuits. foundations of computers. microprocessors architecture. risc. cisc. microcontrollers. 68000. 68hc11. programmable automatons. electronic design. design of specific and semi- specific integrated circuits. synthesis, methodology, and verification of integrated circuits. system on chip. fpga, xilinx, layout, full-custom, standard cells, cadence. vdhl. eagle labview. idass. signal theory. analogical and digital communications. codification and detection of information. transmission systems. radio communication systems. electronics in communications. optical communications. digital signal processing on communications, voice, and image treatment. matlab. languages foundations, and programming methodology. ada. c++. encoding/decoding of information. network architecture. commutation. carrying systems and services. computer architecture. virtual machines. operating systems. real time cores. distributed software. modeling of networks. html. additional courses march 2004 to june 2004 university extension at university of the palmas of gran canaria the market of the technologies of information and communications march 2005 to june 2005 university extension at university of the palmas of gran canaria prevention of labor risks march 2006 to june 2006 university extension at university of the palmas of gran canaria english for the technical environment mother tongue: spanish languages advanced level of english. (*)common european framework of reference for languages toefl, first certificate of english at cambridge, 6th year at spanish official school of languages and intensive english course at eurocentres in silicon valley (california) understanding speaking writing listening reading spoken interaction spoken production c1 independent user c1 independent user c1 independent user c1 independent user c1 independent user work experience june 2009 - september 2009 technology consultant at wikreate-expansion ( silicon valley ) california, ee.uu. - research, analysis and preparation of projects proposals - networking december 2007 - september 2008 hardware designer at philips research ( high tech campus ) the netherlands - developed a 60 ghz remote control for a lighting home automation system - allowed data transfer trough 60 ghz wireless connection using a horn antenna - simulated a direct sequence spread spectrum technique in matlab - implemented a dsss technique in an embedded system using c on an 8051 microcontroller - developed several pcb designs with a high efficiency dc-dc boost converter - increased the link distance 50 % - reduced the remote control weigh in 300 % and the volume in 560 % - reduced the power consumption using 6 batteries less june 2005 - august 2005 maintenance service at eulen s.a. spain - supervised of the building facilities - solved electricity problems, replaced of wires and devices november 2000 - february 2001 census agent at national statistics institute spain - managed the census population - scheduled the time and human resources personal skills social skills - professional ambitions and experience in multicultural environments - great capacity to adapt to new environments and work in teams organizational skills - i like the work well done and i accept the possibility of traveling - ability to lead and make decisions - good time management skills and punctuality computer skills - knowledge of programming languages like ada, matlab, c++, html and labview - knowledge of electronics tools such as vhdl, pspice, eagle - in addition, knowledge of microsoft office software other skills - i practice sports such as paddleball, kick-boxing, and table tennis. i also take yoga classes driving licenses - full clean driving licenses for cars and motorbikes. additional information studies abroad i have studied for one year at the university of sevilla in a séneca student ex-change program. i also have studied at the eindhoven university of technology in the erasmus program, other european student ex-change program. about me i see myself as a hard worker. i love to work by goals, and to go home when things are done rather than at 5 pm. i am very enthusiastic when facing hard projects. i have been developing educational material for the electronics department of the university of las palmas de gran canaria, where in addition, i was involved in an education quality program. finally, i was pre-selected as a young graduate trainee at the international space university by the european space agency. references félix tobajas : hyperlink "mailto:tobajas@iuma.ulpgc.es" tobajas@iuma.ulpgc.es octavio santana : hyperlink "mailto:octavio.santana@philips.com" octavio.santana@philips.com isabel arcones : hyperlink "mailto:isabelarcones@wikreate-expansion.com" isabelarcones@wikreate-expansion.com lennart yseboodt : hyperlink "mailto:lennart.yseboodt@philips.com" lennart.yseboodt@philips.com professional profile : hyperlink "http://www.linkedin.com/in/juanvina" http://www.linkedin.com/in/juanvina letters of recommendation available upon request juan via
